mock|mock-arch-s83|architect|test_arch_s.text: {"design_summary":"A task management web application with user authentication. Built with Node.js API and SQLite database, deployed as a single-server app serving authenticated users.","components":[{"name":"API Server","tech":"Node.js/Express","purpose":"Handles HTTP requests and business logic"},{"name":"Database","tech":"SQLite","purpose":"Persists users, sessions, and tasks"},{"name":"Auth Module","tech":"JWT","purpose":"Issues and validates authentication tokens"}],"data_flow":"Client sends HTTP request to API Server. Auth Module validates JWT. Business logic executes. SQLite is queried. Response returned to client.","technology_choices":[{"category":"language","choice":"JavaScript/Node.js","rationale":"Lightweight runtime; sufficient for CRUD workloads"},{"category":"database","choice":"SQLite","rationale":"Zero-config, file-based; appropriate for single-server MVP"},{"category":"auth","choice":"JWT","rationale":"Stateless tokens simplify horizontal scaling"}],"integration_points":[{"name":"REST API","type":"API","notes":"HTTP endpoints for tasks and users; JSON payloads"}],"identified_risks":[{"risk":"SQLite write contention under concurrent load","severity":"MEDIUM","mitigation":"Add write queue or migrate to PostgreSQL when concurrency exceeds single-digit RPS"}]}

mock|mock-spec-s86|spec_writer|test_spec.text: {"scope":"Build a task management REST API using Node.js and SQLite. The API will expose CRUD endpoints for tasks and users. Authentication uses JWT tokens. Deployed as a single-server Node.js process.","decisions":[{"decision":"Use Express.js as the HTTP framework","rationale":"Minimal setup, well-known, sufficient for CRUD API"},{"decision":"Store data in SQLite file at data/app.db","rationale":"Zero-config, no separate database process required"}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","description":"POST /users returns 201 with user id on valid input"},{"id":"AC-2","description":"POST /auth/login returns JWT token on correct credentials"},{"id":"AC-3","description":"GET /tasks requires valid JWT; returns 401 without token"}],"files_to_create":[{"path":"src/app.js","purpose":"Express app entry point"},{"path":"src/routes/tasks.js","purpose":"Task CRUD route handlers"},{"path":"src/routes/auth.js","purpose":"Auth route handlers"},{"path":"src/db.js","purpose":"SQLite connection and schema init"}],"files_to_modify":[],"out_of_scope":["Real-time task sync","Email notifications","Frontend UI"]}

mock|mock-sec-s96|scenario:S96.text: {"threat_level":"MEDIUM","findings":[{"severity":"WARN","vulnerability":"Missing rate limiting on authentication endpoint","location":"spec.acceptance_criteria/AC-2","attack_vector":"Attacker performs credential stuffing against POST /auth/login with no throttle applied","mitigation":"Add rate limiting middleware capped at 5 login attempts per minute per IP address"},{"severity":"INFO","vulnerability":"JWT secret management not specified in spec","location":"spec.decisions","attack_vector":"Hardcoded or weak JWT secret exposed via source code repository","mitigation":"Require JWT_SECRET via environment variable; fail startup if absent or shorter than 32 characters"}],"summary":"Specification has medium threat exposure. No blockers found. Rate limiting on the auth endpoint is absent and JWT secret management is unspecified. Address the WARN before build proceeds."}

mock|mock-sec-s97|scenario:S97.text: {"threat_level":"HIGH","findings":[{"severity":"BLOCKER","vulnerability":"SQL injection via unsanitized query parameter","location":"src/routes/tasks.js","attack_vector":"GET /tasks?user_id=1 OR 1=1-- bypasses user isolation and returns all tasks in the database","mitigation":"Use parameterized queries via better-sqlite3's prepare().get() with bound parameters only; never concatenate user input into SQL strings"},{"severity":"WARN","vulnerability":"Missing authentication middleware on DELETE endpoint","location":"src/routes/tasks.js","attack_vector":"Unauthenticated DELETE /tasks/:id removes any task without requiring a valid JWT","mitigation":"Apply JWT validation middleware to all DELETE routes before the route handler executes"}],"summary":"Code plan has high threat exposure due to a SQL injection blocker in the task route. This must be resolved before build proceeds. One additional warning about missing authentication on the DELETE endpoint."}
